channel.title: fast-simple-meals Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh fast-simple-meals posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Vibrant Vegan Stir-Fry with Snap Peas and Zingy Sauce for Busy Nights
item.description: This vegan stir-fry is a quick, fresh meal packed with colorful spring veggies and a tangy sauce that wakes up your taste buds. I love the crisp snap peas—it’s perfect for hectic evenings when you want healthy and satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons sesame oil, divided
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup snap peas, trimmed
  • 1 medium carrot, julienned
  • 1 small broccoli crown, cut into florets
  • 1/4 cup soy sauce or tamari
  • 1 tablespoon rice vinegar
  • 1 tablespoon maple syrup
  • 1 teaspoon chili flakes (optional)
  • 2 green onions, sliced
  • 1 tablespoon toasted sesame seeds

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #sesame #cloves #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Vibrant Vegan Stir-Fry with Snap Peas and Zingy Sauce for Busy Nights
media:content.media:description: This vegan stir-fry is a quick, fresh meal packed with colorful spring veggies and a tangy sauce that wakes up your taste buds. I love the crisp snap peas—it’s perfect for hectic evenings when you want healthy and satisfying.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, sesame, cloves, tablespoon

item.title: Creamy Lemon Zest Pasta with Fresh Asparagus and Peas for Cozy Nights
item.description: This pasta is light but indulgent, bursting with fresh asparagus and peas in a silky cream sauce. The lemon zest adds a bright twist that makes it feel special—perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner that’s quick but satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 ounces dry fettuccine or linguine pasta
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 2 cups fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
  • 1 cup fresh or frozen peas
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • Zest of 1 lemon
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Fresh basil or parsley, chopped (optional, for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fettuccine #tablespoon #fresh

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Lemon Zest Pasta with Fresh Asparagus and Peas for Cozy Nights
media:content.media:description: This pasta is light but indulgent, bursting with fresh asparagus and peas in a silky cream sauce. The lemon zest adds a bright twist that makes it feel special—perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner that’s quick but satisfying.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fettuccine, tablespoon, fresh

item.title: Quick High Protein Chicken Stir-Fry That’s Ready in 30 Minutes Flat
item.description: This chicken stir-fry packs a protein punch and comes together super fast. I love how the ginger and garlic combo adds a fresh zing. Great for a quick dinner or post-workout meal!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breast, thinly sliced
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup broccoli florets
  • 1 small carrot, julienned
  • 3 tablespoons low-sodium soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon oyster sauce
  • 1 teaspoon honey
  • 1 teaspoon sesame oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 green onions, sliced for garnish
  • 1 tablespoon toasted sesame seeds (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #vegetable #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick High Protein Chicken Stir-Fry That’s Ready in 30 Minutes Flat
media:content.media:description: This chicken stir-fry packs a protein punch and comes together super fast. I love how the ginger and garlic combo adds a fresh zing. Great for a quick dinner or post-workout meal!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, vegetable, cloves

item.title: Creamy Spinach and Artichoke Pasta That Feels Like a Warm Hug on Busy Nights
item.description: This creamy spinach and artichoke pasta hits all the cozy notes with a silky cream cheese sauce and tender artichokes that add a nice tang. It’s a quick, comforting dinner when you want something rich but easy.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 12 ounces pasta (penne or fusilli), uncooked
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 (14-ounce) can artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
  • 5 ounces fresh spinach, roughly chopped
  • 4 ounces cream cheese, softened
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1/2 cup milk (whole or 2%)
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/4 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes (optional)
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #pasta #tablespoon #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Spinach and Artichoke Pasta That Feels Like a Warm Hug on Busy Nights
media:content.media:description: This creamy spinach and artichoke pasta hits all the cozy notes with a silky cream cheese sauce and tender artichokes that add a nice tang. It’s a quick, comforting dinner when you want something rich but easy.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, pasta, tablespoon, cloves

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Protein-Packed Chicken Stir Fry for Busy Nights
item.description: This stir fry is a quick, protein-rich dinner that’s perfect when you’re short on time but want something healthy and satisfying. Fresh veggies and tender chicken come together with a simple sauce. Great for weeknights!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup broccoli florets
  • 1 medium carrot, julienned
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 3 tablespoons soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon oyster sauce
  • 1 teaspoon cornstarch dissolved in 2 tablespoons water
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Cooked jasmine rice or noodles, for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #vegetable #pepper

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy 30-Minute Protein-Packed Chicken Stir Fry for Busy Nights
media:content.media:description: This stir fry is a quick, protein-rich dinner that’s perfect when you’re short on time but want something healthy and satisfying. Fresh veggies and tender chicken come together with a simple sauce. Great for weeknights!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, vegetable, pepper

item.title: Creamy Mushroom Risotto with Fresh Spring Herbs for Cozy Dinners
item.description: This mushroom risotto is creamy and comforting, with fresh spring herbs adding a bright, fresh note. The mushrooms soak up every bit of the silky sauce, making it perfect for a cozy dinner or a relaxed weekend lunch.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups Arborio rice, uncooked
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, kept warm
  • 12 oz cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 tbsp olive oil
  • 2 tbsp unsalted butter
  • 2 tbsp fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 tbsp fresh thyme leaves
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #arborio #vegetable #cremini

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Mushroom Risotto with Fresh Spring Herbs for Cozy Dinners
media:content.media:description: This mushroom risotto is creamy and comforting, with fresh spring herbs adding a bright, fresh note. The mushrooms soak up every bit of the silky sauce, making it perfect for a cozy dinner or a relaxed weekend lunch.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Mediumpost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, arborio, vegetable, cremini

item.title: Quick and Colorful Spring Veggie Stir-Fry with Snap Peas and Ginger Sauce
item.description: This fresh veggie stir-fry is my go-to for busy nights. The crisp snap peas and zingy soy-ginger sauce make it light but satisfying. Ready in just 30 minutes—perfect for a quick, healthy dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, room temperature
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, minced
  • 1 cup snap peas, trimmed and washed
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1 medium carrot, julienned
  • 1 small zucchini, sliced
  • 3 green onions, chopped
  • 1/4 cup low-sodium soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon rice vinegar
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • 1/4 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes (optional)
  • Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Cooked jasmine rice or noodles, for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #vegetable #cloves #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick and Colorful Spring Veggie Stir-Fry with Snap Peas and Ginger Sauce
media:content.media:description: This fresh veggie stir-fry is my go-to for busy nights. The crisp snap peas and zingy soy-ginger sauce make it light but satisfying. Ready in just 30 minutes—perfect for a quick, healthy dinner!

item.title: Creamy Mushroom and Spinach Risotto That’s Ready in 45 Minutes
item.description: This risotto is a cozy, creamy dish bursting with earthy mushrooms and fresh spinach. The trick is to toast the rice first, giving it a perfect bite. Great for a comforting weeknight meal or a light lunch.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups Arborio rice, uncooked
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, kept warm
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 8 oz cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 3 cups fresh spinach, roughly chopped
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #arborio #vegetable #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Mushroom and Spinach Risotto That’s Ready in 45 Minutes
media:content.media:description: This risotto is a cozy, creamy dish bursting with earthy mushrooms and fresh spinach. The trick is to toast the rice first, giving it a perfect bite. Great for a comforting weeknight meal or a light lunch.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Mediumpost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, arborio, vegetable, olive

item.title: Cozy Chickpea Curry with Fresh Spring Flavors and Coconut Sauce
item.description: This chickpea curry is a quick, comforting dinner that’s packed with fresh spring flavors and warming spices. The chickpeas soak up a fragrant tomato and coconut sauce, making it wholesome and easy for weeknights.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, room temperature
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 teaspoon ground cumin
  • 1 teaspoon ground coriander
  • 1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon chili powder (optional)
  • 1 can (14 oz) diced tomatoes
  • 1 can (14 oz) coconut milk, full fat
  • 2 cans (15 oz each) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
  • Salt to taste
  • Fresh cilantro, chopped for garnish
  • Juice of half a lime

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #garlic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Cozy Chickpea Curry with Fresh Spring Flavors and Coconut Sauce
media:content.media:description: This chickpea curry is a quick, comforting dinner that’s packed with fresh spring flavors and warming spices. The chickpeas soak up a fragrant tomato and coconut sauce, making it wholesome and easy for weeknights.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230749334, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, garlic

item.title: Quick Garlic Butter Shrimp with Fresh Spring Peas for Busy Nights
item.description: This shrimp recipe is a buttery, garlicky treat with sweet spring peas for a fresh pop. It comes together fast, making it a go-to for weeknights or casual dinners with friends.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb raw shrimp, peeled and deveined
  • 2 cups fresh spring peas, shelled
  • 4 tbsp unsalted butter
  • 4 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 tbsp olive oil
  • Salt to taste
  • Freshly ground black pepper to taste
  • 1 tbsp lemon juice
  • 2 tbsp chopped fresh parsley

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #shrimp #fresh #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick Garlic Butter Shrimp with Fresh Spring Peas for Busy Nights
media:content.media:description: This shrimp recipe is a buttery, garlicky treat with sweet spring peas for a fresh pop. It comes together fast, making it a go-to for weeknights or casual dinners with friends.

item.title: Light and Zesty Lemon Herb Tilapia for a Quick Healthy Dinner
item.description: This lemon herb tilapia is a refreshing, quick meal with bright citrus and fresh herbs. The marinade locks in juiciness, making it perfect for a light weeknight dinner or a healthy lunch.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 tilapia fillets, fresh
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • Juice and zest of 1 large lemon
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh dill, chopped
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • Salt, to taste
  • Freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #tilapia #olive #juice

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Light and Zesty Lemon Herb Tilapia for a Quick Healthy Dinner
media:content.media:description: This lemon herb tilapia is a refreshing, quick meal with bright citrus and fresh herbs. The marinade locks in juiciness, making it perfect for a light weeknight dinner or a healthy lunch.

item.title: Bright and Creamy Lemon Herb Risotto with Fresh Asparagus
item.description: This lemon herb risotto is wonderfully creamy with a fresh zing from lemon zest and tender asparagus. It’s a surprisingly quick, light dinner that feels special enough for spring lunches or cozy nights.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 cup Arborio rice
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, kept warm
  • 1 cup asparagus, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
  • Zest and juice of 1 lemon
  • 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • 2 tablespoons fresh parsley, chopped
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230749334 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #tablespoon #small #garlic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: This lemon herb risotto is wonderfully creamy with a fresh zing from lemon zest and tender asparagus. It’s a surprisingly quick, light dinner that feels special enough for spring lunches or cozy nights.

item.title: Creamy Asparagus Parmesan Risotto That’s Ready in Under 45 Minutes
item.description: This risotto is my go-to when I want something creamy and comforting but without hours in the kitchen. The fresh asparagus adds a nice crunch and bright flavor, while Parmesan gives it that rich, cheesy finish. Great for a cozy dinner or a special lunch.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil, room temperature
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup Arborio rice, rinsed
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, kept warm
  • 1 bunch fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
  • 1/2 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter, cold
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Bright and Creamy Spring Pea Risotto with Fresh Mint
item.description: This spring pea risotto is a fresh twist on a classic comfort dish. The bright peas and fragrant mint make it light yet creamy. Perfect for a quick dinner or a vibrant side to your favorite meal.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 cup Arborio rice
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, kept warm
  • 1 1/2 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, chopped
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
